summary: Applied two surgical seam edits to strengthen chapter boundary continuity without changing plot beats: added an explicit callback to Chapter 16's closing thread/timestamp beat in the opening sentence, and carried the no-impact restriction into the final sentence to support transition into Chapter 18's aftermath timeline.
edits: Opening sentence now references the group thread lighting up at 8:17 to echo Chapter 16's tail.
Final sentence now includes Ravi folding the no-impact order into the imaging folder before they leave in the rain.
